7598.one_line_summary: Extends ERC-3009 transfers with ERC-1271 contract wallet signature validation.
7598.notes: Enhancement allowing smart contract wallets to authorize transfers via ERC-1271 signatures alongside ECDSA.

7603.one_line_summary: ERC-1155 extension enabling context-dependent multi-asset output per token.
7603.notes: Allows tokens to expose multiple representations based on context (e.g., different media formats for different consumers).

7604.one_line_summary: Permit approval flow for ERC-1155 tokens with EIP-712 signatures.
7604.notes: Extends ERC-2612/ERC-4494 permit pattern to ERC-1155 multi-asset context. Requires ERC-5216 for amount-based approvals.

7613.one_line_summary: A stateless proxy contract that delegates calls only from its deployer.
7613.notes: Enables deterministic account addresses via CREATE2, alternative to clone/beacon proxies with minimal gas and bytecode.

7615.one_line_summary: Push-based data feed mechanism for atomic publisher-to-subscriber contract updates.
7615.notes: Allows publisher contracts to push data to subscriber contracts with conditional and unconditional subscription modes.

7617.one_line_summary: Chunk support for ERC-5219 Web3 URL resolve mode to fetch large resources.
7617.notes: Extends Web3 URL standard with chunked fetching via web3-next-chunk header to work around gas limits.

7618.one_line_summary: Content encoding decompression for Web3 URL resolve mode.
7618.notes: Supports gzip and brotli decompression for compressed resources in Web3 URL protocol.

7621.one_line_summary: Multi-asset basket token with weighted constituents and owner-managed rebalancing.
7621.notes: Standardizes manager-rebalanced weighted baskets; basket contract is ERC-20 share token. Distinct from ERC-4626/ERC-7575.

7627.one_line_summary: End-to-end encrypted messaging protocol for on-chain user communication.
7627.notes: Enables registered public key encryption for private messages; supports multiple algorithms (ECDSA, ED25519, X25519).

7628.one_line_summary: ERC-721 extension adding queryable, transferable ownership shares per token.
7628.notes: Bridges ERC-721 uniqueness with ERC-1155-like share mechanics for dividend/rights distribution.

7629.one_line_summary: Unified interface for ERC-20 and ERC-721 tokens with mode conversion support.
7629.notes: Proposes single interface and state transitions between fungible and non-fungible modes; addresses fragmentation.

7631.one_line_summary: Linked ERC-20 and ERC-721 contracts with optional per-account NFT skipping.
7631.notes: Enables dual-nature token pairs; ERC-20 base syncs with ERC-721 mirror. Skip NFT feature prevents O(n) gas blowup.

7632.one_line_summary: Adds string name support and bidirectional token-name mapping for NFTs.
7632.notes: Allows tokens to be identified by human-readable names; supports both custom and default keccak256-based mapping.

7634.one_line_summary: ERC-721 extension capping the number of times a token can be transferred.
7634.notes: Enforces per-token transfer limits; does not count mint/burn. Enables use cases like wear-out mechanics and value preservation.

7638.one_line_summary: Batch calls encoding for smart contract accounts enabling atomic multi-call execution.
7638.notes: Compresses multiple calls (to, value, data) into bytes for gas efficiency and atomic bundler-paid transactions.
